about.title: Portfolio Overview
about.subtitle: AI-powered applications focused on real-world productivity and automation
about.vision1: This portfolio brings together AI-powered applications focused on personal productivity, smart finances, sports analytics, and AI-assisted software generation, showcasing a solid range of real-world use cases for intelligent assistants and modern automation.
about.vision2: From daily intelligence briefings for commuters to fantasy football analytics and AI-assisted development studios, each application demonstrates how artificial intelligence can transform complex data into actionable insights and streamline decision-making processes.
about.vision3Bold: AI-first solutions that convert complex information into simple decisions
about.vision3End: , optimize user time and resources, and accelerate the creation of new digital products.
about.value1Desc: AI Commute, BudgetFlow, and Agile Tracker help users and teams consume information, decide, and prioritize better with less friction.
about.value2Desc: FootballStats and BudgetFlow show how to transform raw data (sports, finance) into actionable indicators and intuitive visualizations.
about.value3Desc: VibeForge positions the portfolio at the frontier of AI for development, from idea to structured code ready for production.

projects.title: AI-Powered Applications
projects.subtitle: A comprehensive portfolio showcasing real-world intelligent automation

aiCommute.title: AI Commute Summarizer
aiCommute.tagline: Daily Intelligence Briefing, Synthesized for the Road
aiCommute.description: Daily assistant that converts news sources, briefings, and internal updates into brief, easy-to-consume summaries during commute time.

budgetFlow.title: BudgetFlow (MoneyMinder)
budgetFlow.description: Personal finance platform with intelligent tracking of income and expenses, flexible categorization, visual reports, and multilingual support.

agileTracker.title: Processing Team Agile Tracker
agileTracker.description: Agile management tool for teams, focused on sprint planning, collaboration, goal alignment, and visualization of progress and team velocity.

vibeForge.title: VibeForge - Smooth Build Studio
vibeForge.description: AI-powered development environment where users describe product vision and the system generates page structure, components, and services.

footballStats.title: FootballStats - Fantasy Power Index
footballStats.tagline: Fantasy Pitch Pulse: Advanced Football Analytics
footballStats.description: Football analytics dashboard with player rankings, proprietary FPI metrics, multiple leagues and sections like Dream Team Builder.

thursdayFootball.title: ThursdayFootball
thursdayFootball.description: Social platform to organize football matches between friends and colleagues. Create games, manage teams, track who's playing.

footballAcademy.title: Football Academy Manager
footballAcademy.tagline: Complete SaaS Platform for Youth Football Academies
footballAcademy.description: End-to-end management platform for youth football academies. Handles student enrollment, class scheduling, payment processing, coach assignment, and parent communication.

hearthbeat.title: Hearthbeat Family Hub
hearthbeat.description: Family hub concept integrating coordination, communication, and intelligent recommendations for the home.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by forward-thinking companies
testimonials.t1Text: The AI strategy roadmap they delivered transformed our approach to data processing. We reduced manual work by 60%.
testimonials.t2Text: Their expertise in AI integration was exactly what we needed. Seamlessly connected our legacy systems with modern ML.
testimonials.t3Text: The sports analytics dashboard processes millions of data points in real-time. Our users love the intuitive visualizations.
testimonials.t4Text: From concept to production in just 8 weeks. Their AI-assisted development approach accelerated our time-to-market.

cases.title: Use Cases & Delivered Solutions
cases.subtitle: Real challenges solved with custom AI tools. Each solution was designed, built, and delivered to address a specific business need.
cases.sum1Desc: AI-powered tools that help users consume information faster and prioritize what matters.
cases.sum2Desc: Transforming raw data from sports, finance, and operations into intuitive visualizations and actionable indicators.
cases.sum3Desc: From idea to working software — AI accelerates the entire development lifecycle.
cases.conclusion: Each solution demonstrates how focused AI tools
cases.conclusionBold: turn complex problems into simple, automated workflows.

aiCommute.title: AI Commute Summarizer
aiCommute.challenge: Too much information, too little time on the commute
aiCommute.solution: We built a daily AI assistant that converts news, briefings, and updates into brief audio summaries optimized for commute time. NLP-powered synthesis delivers only what matters.

budgetFlow.title: BudgetFlow (MoneyMinder)
budgetFlow.challenge: No visibility over personal finances across categories
budgetFlow.solution: We designed an intelligent finance tracker with AI-powered categorization, visual reports, spending insights, and multilingual support. Users see where their money goes at a glance.

agileTracker.title: Agile Sprint Tracker
agileTracker.challenge: Teams losing velocity without clear sprint visibility
agileTracker.solution: We delivered an agile management tool with sprint planning, goal alignment, and real-time velocity tracking. AI supports task prioritization and progress forecasting.

vibeForge.title: VibeForge - AI Build Studio
vibeForge.challenge: Going from product idea to code takes too long
vibeForge.solution: We created an AI-powered development environment where users describe their vision and the system generates page structure, components, and services — with instant preview and exportable code.

footballStats.title: Fantasy Football Analytics
footballStats.challenge: Raw sports data without actionable insights for fantasy leagues
footballStats.solution: We built an analytics dashboard with proprietary FPI metrics, player rankings across 5+ leagues, Dream Team Builder, and near real-time data processing for advanced sports intelligence.

thursdayFootball.title: Social Match Organizer
thursdayFootball.challenge: Coordinating casual football matches is chaotic
thursdayFootball.solution: We delivered a social platform that handles match creation, team management, attendance tracking, and even jersey washing rotation — eliminating the group chat chaos.

footballAcademy.title: Football Academy Manager
footballAcademy.challenge: Youth academies managing enrollment, payments, and scheduling manually
footballAcademy.solution: We built a complete SaaS platform handling student enrollment, class scheduling, payment processing, coach assignment, and parent communication — all in one place.

hearthbeat.title: Blood Pressure & Pulse Tracker
hearthbeat.challenge: No historical visibility of blood pressure and pulse for informed medical decisions
hearthbeat.solution: We built a family health monitoring app that tracks blood pressure and pulse readings over time for each family member. Historical trends, visual charts, and exportable reports give both you and your doctor a clear overview before making any health decision.
